# Workflow Documentation Index

## Purpose
This directory contains the target-state user workflow documentation for <Project Name>.

Workflow docs should answer:
- who the workflow is for
- what the user is trying to accomplish
- what order the user works in
- what surfaces or interfaces are involved
- what information the system should expose at each step

## Workflow set
| Workflow | Primary persona | Purpose | Overview doc | Details doc |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| <workflow> | <persona> | <what the workflow accomplishes> | `<workflow>_user_workflow.md` | `<workflow>_user_workflow_details.md` |

## Authoring rules
- Overview docs define the target-state journey and conceptual model.
- Details docs define the operational step-by-step interaction model.
- These docs are not implementation plans or gap trackers.
- Link each workflow to the relevant requirement IDs in `docs/requirements.md`.
